Statute.Title: High-Speed Rail Network Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Réseau ferroviaire à grande vitesse, Loi sur le)

Item.Text: — s. 191, enacting ss. 1 to 25 of the High-Speed Rail Network Act, in force on assent (26.03.2026)
— s. 192 comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the governor in Council, see s. 194 — Not in force
